subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the King of Kings unto him who hath believed in God, the Mighty, the All-Loving. O Generous One! We have remembered thee time and again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الملوک لمن آمن بالله العزیز الودود یا کریم انا ذکرناک مره بعد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort
